parameters.content:
## AI News-to-Market Matcher

Matches breaking news from RSS feeds to live Polymarket prediction markets, then uses AI to assess impact and send trading signals.

**Setup:**
1. Set your RSS feed URL in the RSS Feed Trigger node (default: Google News top stories)
2. Configure an OpenAI credential for the AI analysis node
3. Set up Telegram or Slack credentials for alerts
4. Adjust the confidence threshold in the IF node (default: 70)

**How it works:**
- RSS trigger fires on new articles
- Extracts keywords from the headline and searches Polymarket
- Gets live pricing for the best matching market
- AI analyzes whether the news affects the market and predicts direction
- High-confidence signals are sent to Telegram
